name: Sweet Fried Rice with Almonds and Cinnamon
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried fruit in water with 1 teaspoon vanilla for 40 minutes.
2. Heat oil in a wok; add almonds and stir-fry until toasted, about 1 minute. Remove with a slotted spoon.
3. Reduce heat to moderate and add 2 tablespoons butter. Add onions and stir-fry until lightly browned.
4. Add 1/4 cup sugar and continue stirring until melted and caramelized.
5. Add 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon and the dried fruit mixture.
6. Stir-fry for 1 minute. Remove to a bowl.
7. Melt remaining butter in the wok; add rice, remaining vanilla, sugar, and salt. Stir-fry until rice is separate grains and some have toasted lightly.
8. Push rice up sides of wok and pour fruit into center. Mix in rice.
9. Turn out onto platter and decorate with toasted almonds.
10. Sprinkle remaining cinnamon mixed with cloves on top.
